entities.name: PICALM
entities.context: Previous studies have examined the roles of three polymorphisms (rs3851179, rs541458, and rs592297) of the PICALM gene in susceptibility to Alzheimer's disease

entities.name: rs3851179 A allele
entities.context: Compared with G carriers, A carriers of rs3851179 were associated with a decreased risk of AD

entities.name: rs541458 C allele

relations.evidence: PICALM gene ... Monomeric Clathrin Assembly Proteins
polymorphisms ... of the PICALM gene in susceptibility to Alzheimer's disease (AD)
A carriers of rs3851179 were associated with a decreased risk of AD (OR = 0.88; 95% CI 0.84, 0.91, P for Z-test <0.001)
C carriers of rs541458 were inversely associated with AD risk (OR = 0.86; 95% CI 0.81, 0.92)
A carriers of rs3851179 were associated with a decreased risk of AD
the protective effect of the rs541458 C allele was observed only among Caucasians
